description: Hotfix for Critical and High severity issues found during evaluation — memory leaks, race conditions, security gaps, infrastructure hardening

userStories.title: Temp link and blacklist cleanup goroutine
userStories.description: As the system, I need expired temporary links and blacklist entries to be cleaned up periodically so that memory doesn't grow unbounded.
acceptanceCriteria: Background goroutine runs every 1 hour in web-backend
Removes expired links from linkStore.links map (expiry < now)
Removes blacklist entries for expired links from linkStore.blacklist map
Cleanup is logged (count of removed items)
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Persist JWT secret across restarts
userStories.description: As the system, I need the JWT secret to persist across container restarts so that existing user tokens remain valid.
acceptanceCriteria: If JWT_SECRET env var is set, use it (existing behavior)
If not set, generate a random secret and write it to /data/.jwt-secret file
On next startup, read secret from /data/.jwt-secret if it exists
/data/ is already volume-mounted so secret survives restarts
Log warning if using auto-generated secret (recommend setting JWT_SECRET for production)
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Fix race condition in hw-gateway device status
userStories.description: As the system, I need device status updates to be thread-safe so that concurrent heartbeat processing doesn't cause data races.
acceptanceCriteria: All field writes to device status happen while holding the write lock
Lock is not released until all field assignments are complete
heartbeatChecker goroutine holds read lock while reading lastSeen
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Use fully parameterized SQL in incident queries
userStories.description: As a developer, I need incident queries to use parameterized SQL throughout so that the query building pattern is safe and consistent.
acceptanceCriteria: Replace string concatenation in incidents.go with parameterized query builder
All WHERE clauses use ? placeholders with args slice
Count query and data query both use the same parameterized approach
Existing pagination and date filters still work correctly
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Add context timeout to alert forwarding goroutines
userStories.description: As the system, I need alert forwarding in hw-gateway to have timeouts so that goroutines don't leak when downstream services are unresponsive.
acceptanceCriteria: Alert forwarding goroutines (to notifier and web-backend) use context.WithTimeout (10s)
If timeout fires, goroutine logs error and exits cleanly
HTTP client uses the context for the request
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Fix WebSocket channel close race condition
userStories.description: As the system, I need WebSocket client message sending to be safe from channel close panics.
acceptanceCriteria: Use non-blocking send with select/default for client.send channel writes
If send channel is full or closed, log and skip (don't panic)
Initial connection message uses same non-blocking pattern
No panic possible from writing to closed channel
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Require strong admin password
userStories.description: As an admin, I need the system to warn about weak default admin passwords so that the deployment is secure.
acceptanceCriteria: If ADMIN_PASSWORD env var equals sentinel1234 or is unset, log a WARNING at startup
Warning message: Using default admin password. Set ADMIN_PASSWORD env var for production.
Password minimum length validation: at least 8 characters
Admin seeding still works with custom password via env var
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Check temp link request body decode errors
userStories.description: As the system, I need malformed temp link requests to return proper errors instead of silently creating links with empty labels.
acceptanceCriteria: json.NewDecoder(r.Body).Decode(&req) error is checked
Invalid JSON returns 400 with error message
Empty body still works (label is optional)
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Check json.Marshal errors in all services
userStories.description: As a developer, I need all json.Marshal calls to check for errors so that serialization failures are not silent.
acceptanceCriteria: All json.Marshal() calls in hw-gateway, notifier, and web-backend check the error return
On error, log the issue and return 500 (or skip the operation with a log)
No more _ discarding of marshal errors
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Add Docker healthchecks to all services
userStories.description: As an operator, I need Docker healthchecks so that failed containers are detected and can be restarted automatically.
acceptanceCriteria: docker-compose.yml has healthcheck block for all services
Backend Go services: wget or curl to http://localhost:8080/healthz
mosquitto: mosquitto_sub check or similar
web-frontend: curl -f http://localhost:80/
streaming: curl -f http://localhost:8080/healthz
interval: 30s, timeout: 5s, retries: 3
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Fix nginx WebSocket proxy timeouts
userStories.description: As the system, I need complete nginx proxy timeout configuration for WebSocket connections so that connections don't drop unexpectedly.
acceptanceCriteria: nginx.conf WebSocket location block includes proxy_connect_timeout 60s
nginx.conf WebSocket location block includes proxy_send_timeout 60s
proxy_read_timeout 86400s is already present (verify)
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Fix HLS.js instance cleanup on disconnect
userStories.description: As the system, I need HLS.js instances to be properly destroyed when a camera disconnects so that memory doesn't accumulate.
acceptanceCriteria: When status === disconnected, destroy existing HLS.js instance before returning
useEffect cleanup function always destroys HLS.js instance on unmount
No HLS.js instances accumulate when switching cameras or on disconnect/reconnect cycles
Typecheck passes
Verify in browser using dev-browser skill

userStories.title: Add FFmpeg command timeout in cctv-adapter
userStories.description: As the system, I need FFmpeg processes to have timeouts so that hung RTSP connections don't block camera reconnection forever.
acceptanceCriteria: FFmpeg command execution uses context.WithTimeout or equivalent watchdog
If FFmpeg produces no output for 30 seconds, the process is killed and reconnection starts
Timeout is configurable via env var (default 30s)
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Silent camera fetch error handling in frontend
userStories.description: As a user, I need to see an error state when the camera API is unreachable so that I know the system status.
acceptanceCriteria: ViewerPage and CCTVPage show error message when /api/cameras fetch fails
Error message shown to user in Korean
Retry continues in background (existing 30s polling)
When API recovers, error clears and cameras load
Typecheck passes
Verify in browser using dev-browser skill
